pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to target Java 11 for compilation.
Add Jib Maven plugin to build container images using a Java 11 base image.
Update Liquibase plugin to use Hibernate 5 extensions compatible with newer Spring Boot versions.
Add ArchUnit dependencies for architectural testing with JUnit 5.
Add JJWT API and implementation dependencies for JWT handling.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for metrics exposure.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web library for standardized error responses.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for security testing.
Add Spring Boot Test dependency for integration testing.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine to enforce JUnit 5 usage.
Add Maven Checkstyle plugin for code style enforcement.
Add Maven Javadoc plugin for documentation generation.
Add Maven Failsafe plugin for integration test execution.
Add Maven IDEA plugin for IntelliJ IDEA project generation.
Add Maven Resources plugin for resource filtering configuration.
Add Maven Surefire plugin for unit test execution.
Add SonarQube Scanner Maven plugin for code quality analysis.
Add Properties Maven plugin to read project properties from files.
Add Git Commit ID plugin to generate git properties.
Add Frontend Maven plugin for Node.js/NPM integration.
Add Maven WAR plugin for WAR packaging configuration.
Add Maven Clean plugin for build cleanup.
Add Maven Eclipse plugin for Eclipse project generation.
Add Maven Enforcer plugin to enforce Java and Maven version constraints.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add Liquibase Maven plugin for database migration management.
Add Spring Boot Maven plugin for application packaging and execution.
Add Spring Boot Thymeleaf starter for template rendering.
Add Spring Boot Web starter for web application support.
Add Spring Boot Test starter for testing support.
Add Spring Security Data dependency for security data support.
Add Dropwizard Metrics Core dependency for metrics collection.
Remove Spring Cloud Cloud Foundry connector dependency.
Remove Spring Cloud Spring Service connector dependency.
Remove Spring Cloud Local Config connector dependency.
Remove Spark Metrics Reporter dependency.
Remove Maven SortPom plugin for POM sorting.
Remove Gatling Maven plugin for load testing.
Remove Maven Processor plugin for annotation processing.
Introduce maven-surefire-plugin and maven-failsafe-plugin to manage unit and integration test execution with specific exclusion/inclusion patterns.
Add sonar-maven-plugin to enable static code analysis integration.
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin with repackage goal and main class configuration for executable jar generation.
Add a Maven profile to disable Liquibase database migrations during startup.
Add a Maven profile to enable API documentation generation.
Add a Maven profile to enable TLS/SSL configuration.
Add a Maven profile to manage frontend build using webpack via frontend-maven-plugin.
Refactor dev profile to include H2 database, devtools, and Undertow, and integrate new profile properties.
Switch production profile embedded server from Tomcat to Undertow for better performance.
Remove yeoman-maven-plugin as the build system migrates away from Yeoman/Grunt.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to production profile to handle Node/NPM installation and Webpack production builds.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to generate build information including git commit details.
Add a Maven profile to support building WAR files for deployment to external servlet containers.
Add an IDE profile to include annotation processors for MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator.
Add an Eclipse-specific profile to handle m2e lifecycle mapping and ignore specific plugin executions.
Add an e2e profile for end-to-end testing configuration.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Refactor .editorconfig to use a specific glob pattern for frontend and config files instead of a global rule, allowing distinct indentation settings for different file types.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Replaced global `indent_size = 2` with `[*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] indent_size = 2` and moved general `indent_size = 4` to the root `[*]` section.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to ensure correct line-ending normalization and binary file handling across diverse file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced `* text eol=lf` and specific extensions with `* text=auto` and a detailed list of text/binary/diff rules for various formats (scripts, docs, configs, media).

.gitignore.general_idea: Refactor .gitignore to use modern directory-only patterns and add new tool-specific ignore rules for VS Code, STS4, and ESLint.
.gitignore.human_impl: Changed patterns like '/node_modules/**' to 'node_modules/' and added sections for '.vscode/', '/.sts4-cache/*', and '.eslintcache'.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration target.
Change authentication mechanism from session-based to JWT, which is the default for newer JHipster versions.
Migrate frontend build tool from Grunt to npm and framework to AngularX as per JHipster 7 defaults.
Rename the application base name and package structure to match the new project identity.
Explicitly define Gatling and Protractor as test frameworks in the configuration.
Register specific domain entities (BankAccount, Label, Operation) in the generator configuration.
Normalize boolean configuration values from string representations to actual booleans.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the placeholder README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with full JHipster development, build, and testing instructions.

package.json.general_idea: Update the required Node.js version to 14.15.0 to align with modern tooling and JDK 11 era build environments.
Replace the legacy Grunt-based build system and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, karma, and angularjs deps; added @angular/core, @angular/cli, and webpack.

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency to version 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Add core Angular 11 framework libraries required for the application to compile and run.
Add Angular CLI and compiler tools necessary for building the Angular application.
Add Webpack and related plugins to replace Grunt as the module bundler and build tool.
Replace Karma/Jasmine with Jest for unit testing, adding necessary Jest dependencies and reporters.
Introduce ESLint and Prettier for code formatting and linting, replacing JSHint.
Add Protractor and WebDriver Manager for end-to-end testing, replacing the old Karma-based e2e setup.
Add npm scripts and dependencies like 'concurrently' and 'wait-on' to facilitate CI/CD pipelines.
Add Bootstrap and Angular-specific UI libraries (ng-bootstrap, FontAwesome) for the frontend interface.
Add utility libraries like RxJS, DayJS, and Zone.js required for Angular application logic.
Add TypeScript compiler and type definitions to support the migration from JavaScript to TypeScript.
Add Husky and lint-staged to enforce code quality checks on commit.
Add OpenAPI generator CLI to generate client code from API specifications.
Add Angular Service Worker support for PWA capabilities.
Add ngx-translate libraries for internationalization support.
Add ngx-webstorage for simplified local/session storage access in Angular.
Add ngx-infinite-scroll for scroll-based content loading.
Add Swagger UI distribution for API documentation visualization.
Add BrowserSync for live reloading during development.
Add various Webpack plugins for build optimization, notifications, and analysis.
Add Jest reporters for JUnit and SonarQube integration.
Add Mocha and Chai for additional testing capabilities, likely for backend or specific frontend tests.
Add ts-node for running TypeScript files directly in Node.js.
Add rimraf for cross-platform recursive file deletion in scripts.
Add merge-jsons-webpack-plugin to merge JSON files during the build process.
Add friendly-errors-webpack-plugin to improve build error readability.
Add simple-progress-webpack-plugin to display build progress.
Add ESLint plugins for Angular and TypeScript specific linting rules.
Add eslint-config-prettier to disable ESLint rules that conflict with Prettier.
Add eslint-webpack-plugin to run ESLint during the Webpack build.
Add prettier-plugin-java to format Java files with Prettier.
Add @angular-builders/custom-webpack to allow custom Webpack configurations in Angular CLI.
Add jest-date-mock to mock Date objects in Jest tests.
Add chai-as-promised for handling promises in Chai assertions.
Add chai-string for string-specific assertions in Chai.
Add TypeScript definitions for Chai.
Add TypeScript definitions for chai-string.
Add TypeScript definitions for Jest.
Add TypeScript definitions for Mocha.
Add TypeScript definitions for Selenium WebDriver.
Add @typescript-eslint/parser for ESLint to parse TypeScript files.
Add tslib as a runtime dependency for TypeScript helpers.
Add @angular/localize for internationalization support in Angular.
Add @angular/platform-browser for browser-specific Angular functionality.
Add @angular/platform-browser-dynamic for dynamic compilation in Angular.
Add @angular/router for routing in Angular applications.
Add @angular/forms for form handling in Angular.
Add @angular/compiler for Angular template compilation.
Add FontAwesome icons and Angular integration for UI icons.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the H2 database alias to reflect the specific application name instead of a generic label.
src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.human_impl: Changed alias from 'JHipster H2 (Embedded)' to 'JHipster H2 (Memory)' and updated the identifier to 'jhipsterElasticsearchSampleApplication'.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Allow the H2 web console to be accessed from other hosts, likely for development convenience.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's default colored banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Refactor application configuration from legacy JHipster 5 format to JHipster 6 standard structure with explicit profile inclusions and comments.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Replaced flat property lists with structured sections, added 'api-docs' profile inclusion, and updated header comments.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update logging levels and package names to match the new JHipster 6 package structure and debug requirements.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Changed logging levels for 'tech.jhipster' and 'io.github.jhipster.sample' packages to DEBUG.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy JdbcDataSource to HikariCP and update H2 connection string.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Set 'spring.datasource.type' to 'com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource' and updated URL to 'jdbc:h2:mem:jhipsterelasticsearchsampleapplication'.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect class path to reflect the new JHipster 6 domain package structure.
Migrate Elasticsearch configuration from legacy transport client properties to REST client properties.
Remove legacy metrics configuration (Spark, Graphite) which is no longer supported or configured in this profile in JHipster 6.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Deleted the entire 'metrics' section including spark and graphite configurations.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate cache configuration from root-level properties to the new 'jhipster.cache' namespace.
Migrate security and JWT configuration to the new 'jhipster.security' namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Added 'jhipster.security.authentication.jwt' section with base64-secret and token validity settings.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration to standard Spring Boot properties and add JHipster-specific base-url.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Moved mail host/port to 'spring.mail' and added 'jhipster.mail.base-url'.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf configuration to remove XHTML mode which is deprecated/removed in newer versions.
Add Spring Boot DevTools configuration for the development profile.
Migrate CORS configuration to the new 'jhipster.cors' namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Added 'jhipster.cors' section with allowed-origins, methods, headers, etc.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool with updated JDBC URL parameters required for modern MySQL drivers.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed `dataSourceClassName` to `com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource` and updated `url` to include `useSSL=false&useLegacyDatetimeCode=false&serverTimezone=UTC`.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Elasticsearch configuration from legacy transport client properties to Spring Data Elasticsearch REST client properties.
Remove deprecated Hibernate naming strategy property which is incompatible with newer Hibernate versions used in Java 11/JHipster 6.
Replace legacy Dropwizard metrics configuration with Spring Boot Actuator Micrometer configuration.
Migrate security configuration from generic properties to JHipster-specific JWT security properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added `jhipster.security.authentication.jwt` block with base64-secret and validity settings.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate cache configuration from generic properties to JHipster-specific Ehcache properties.
Add modern server configuration options like graceful shutdown and compression supported in newer Spring Boot versions.
Update logging configuration to use standard Spring Boot logging levels and JHipster specific logging properties.
Migrate mail configuration to include JHipster specific base-url property.
Update HTTP cache time-to-live to a longer duration suitable for production assets.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management endpoint configuration.
Update async task execution configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x spring.task.execution namespace.
Refactor JPA and Hibernate properties to align with Spring Boot 2.x and JHipster 6.x standards.
Update Swagger documentation properties to match JHipster 6.x structure and naming conventions.
Configure Kubernetes-style liveness and readiness probes in the health endpoint.
Enable Prometheus metrics export and configure distribution percentiles.
Move mail configuration into the JHipster specific namespace and disable health check by default.
Enforce HTTP-only cookies for server sessions to improve security.
